Hearing Re: Defendant Robert Lo's Motion To Set Aside Default/Default Judgment/Leave To Defend.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant Robert Lo's unopposed "motion to set aside default and for leave to defend action - CCP 473(d), 473.5" is granted.

The Court will sign the submitted proposed order.
